common.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

onDutyCard.title: My on-duty hours
onDutyCard.notLinked: Your profile isn't linked to a receptionist record yet — ask the admin to run the invite flow or set {code} for your user.

availability.subheading: The hours you're available to cover customer chat + phone. The AI conversation layer (Phase 8) will route inbound messages to whichever receptionist is on duty.
availability.sectionHelper: Submit weekly recurring windows. Each window covers chat + phone together — V1 is one mode.
availability.notLinkedBody: Your profile isn't linked to a receptionist record yet. Ask an admin to run the invite flow for your email (or set {code}). Once linked, refresh this page.

availabilitySection.defaultHelper: Single on-duty window covers chat + phone. Rules snap to the 15-minute grid and must be at least 30 minutes long — no overlaps on the same day.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.empty: No bookings match the current filter.

newPage.title: New booking
newPage.subheading: Create a booking on behalf of a customer. Leave the therapist unassigned if you don't have someone specific in mind — the manager will assign one after payment.

stepSlot.heading: Choose date and time
stepSlot.noSlots: No available times this day. Try another date.

stepContact.heading: Contact details
stepContact.subheading: We'll contact you and send an SMS confirmation
stepContact.namePlaceholder: As it appears on your ID

errors.name: Please enter your full name
errors.phone: Please enter a valid Israeli phone number

book.slotHeld: Your slot is held for {minutes} min. Complete payment to confirm.

holdExpired.heading: Time expired
holdExpired.body: Your booking has expired. Please start over.

methodPicker.heading: How would you like to pay?

creditCardFull.title: Credit card — full payment now
creditCardFull.subtitle: Charged immediately on a secure page

cashAtReception.title: Cash at reception
cashAtReception.subtitle: Card verification only to hold your slot. No charge now. Late cancel / no-show may incur a cancellation fee.

voucherVpay.title: Stored-value voucher
voucherVpay.subtitle: VPay multi-wallet card — partial payment supported

cancellationPolicy.heading: Cancellation policy
cancellationPolicy.summary: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before. Late cancel or no-show — cancellation fee of 5% of the price or 100 ₪, whichever is lower.

cardcom.waiting: Waiting for bank approval… this page updates automatically.

voucherDts.noItems: No available benefits on this card

voucherVpay.remainingNote: This amount is lower than the treatment price. The remaining {amount} will be charged by another payment method.

success.heading: Thank you! Your booking is confirmed.
success.body: We've sent you an SMS confirmation. See you at your treatment!

errors.tokenExpired: Payment window expired. Please start over.
errors.paymentFailed: Payment failed. Try again or contact reception.

order.testMode: TEST MODE · all payments are in test mode. Any card / barcode will auto-confirm the booking.
